chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.S-117 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 17.04.2025 Mr. Poonjo Ruplani Advocate for Petitioner along with Petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Yousuf Rahpoto Assistant AG. along with ASI Muhammad Paryal on behalf of SHO PS Qazi Ahmed. -.-.-. Mr. Aijaz Ali Bhutto Advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of Respondent No.5 and also files statement stating that the detenue has converted from Hinduism to Islam and married Respondent No.5. He in support of his contention files nikahnama as well as her conversion Sanad as well as her freewill Affidavit. The detenue is present in Court and states that she has converted to Islam and wants to live freely with her husband (Respondent No.5). In light of this statement made by the detenue who seems to be sui juris and has converted to Islam on her own freewill, is allowed to live her life freely and on her own choice. The Petition in such circumstances is disposed of as become infructuous. J U D G E Ali Haider
